description: # Scoreboard A simple scoreboard plugin for PowerNukkitX You can change the scoreboard in the config file. This plugin works best with [PlaceholderAPI](https://github.com/PowerNukkitX-Bundle/PlaceholderAPI) Default configuration: ```yaml header: "§ePowerNukkitX Server" lines: - "" - "§7Welcome %player_displayname%" - "§5%player_pos%" - "§7Your money: §q%money%" #Requires LLamaEconomy - "" - "§7Your ping: §v%player_ping%ms" - "§7Online: §t%server_online% / %server_max_players%" - "" - "§b%server_motd%" - "§eThank you for using PNX" ```
name: Scoreboard
summary: Add a scoreboard to your PowerNukkitX server.

versions.changelog: Fixed a bug that spammed the console after a player left the server
versions.name: Scoreboard 1.0.1
